tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Return git status for the current repository.

tools.name: list_tmp
tools.description: List entries in /tmp using a shell command.

function.name: echo_args_python
function.description: Echo the JSON tool arguments back using a small Python one-liner.

value.description: A string value to echo back.

count.description: An optional integer to include in the response.

argv: import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({'received': data}, indent=2))

function.name: show_file_head
function.description: Print the first N lines of a file.

path.description: Path to the file to preview.

argv: import json,os,sys,pathlib; data=json.load(sys.stdin); base=pathlib.Path(os.environ.get('OOPROXY_TOOL_CWD', os.getcwd())); path=pathlib.Path(data['path']); path = path if path.is_absolute() else (base / path); lines=int(data.get('lines',20)); print(''.join(path.read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(True)[:lines]))
